national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Houston Gold Buyers
buyers.payout_claims: Says they will 'beat any legitimate offer'; no percent-of-spot posted
buyers.testing_transparency: State-certified scales and electronic assay analyzers; testing done in front of you
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: family-owned since 1993 (two generations), 'fully bonded insurance policy', A+ BBB, affiliated with PCGS/NGC/IWJG, compliant with Texas Precious Metals Division and LeadsOnline. Describes 'state-certified scales and XRF analyzers' with testing 'in front of you'. Free appraisals, immediate cash payment, 'No Appointment Needed: Walk-ins welcome'. Location noted as near Montrose/Galleria.

buyers.name: Houston Jewelry & Fine Gifts (Houston Jewelry Inc.)
buyers.payout_claims: 150% of cash value as trade-in credit toward new fine jewelry; 'up to 50% more than our already-market-leading cash price' when trading in; cash offers keyed to current New York spot
buyers.testing_transparency: Spectrometer assay plus specific gravity, electronic resistance, and traditional acid testing when needed — all done right in front of you
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold-buying page: in business since 1953. Quotes: 'analyze your precious metals using our state of the art equipment, including XRF, specific gravity scale, electronic resistance testing, and traditional acid testing if needed' and 'All of this is done right in front of you'. Header promises 'Free, No-Pressure Offer'. Walk-ins welcome, 'call ahead for faster service'. Has a dedicated Galleria gold-buyer landing page (7 min west of the Galleria on Westheimer).

buyers.name: Houston Gold Exchange
buyers.payout_claims: 'We guarantee the highest prices for your gold' — no percent-of-spot posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Says appraisers test and weigh your gold with 'cutting-edge technology'; specific method not named and not stated to happen in front of you
buyers.evidence_notes: we-buy-gold-houston page: 'over 40 years' in business, licensed Houston gold buyer, buys coins, bars, bullion, jewelry. Selling process describes submitting info then scheduling 'a One-on-One Consultation', suggesting appointment-led rather than pure walk-in. No fee policy or testing method detail published — flagged for verification.

buyers.name: Gold & Silver Traders
buyers.address: 5901 Westheimer Rd Suite C, Houston, TX 77057
buyers.payout_claims: Refining service pays 'up to 99% of spot based on quantity'
buyers.testing_transparency: Spectrometer assay; 'everything is done right in front of you while you watch'
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage + /refining/ + /contact/: family-owned 'over 40 years' / 'since 1982'. Uses 'XRF technology' per homepage, with quote 'everything is done right in front of you while you watch'. Refining page claims 'up to 99% of spot based on quantity'. Posts live retail bullion sell prices (e.g. Gold Eagle) but not buy rates for customer scrap. Walk-ins invited ('Stop by our store today'); free consultations bookable for $10k+ investors. Address/phone from contact page. Location is in the Galleria/Westheimer corridor.

buyers.name: U.S. Coins and Jewelry
buyers.payout_claims: '80% or better for good clean gold under a few ounces'; payout 'usually higher' for high-karat, wearable gold, and collectible coins
buyers.testing_transparency: Spectrometer assay conducted directly in front of you; scales certified and calibrated by the State of Texas
buyers.evidence_notes: Sell-scrap page: 'State-of-the-art X-Ray Fluorescence (XRF) analyzer to test the purity of your metals', analysis 'directly in front of you', Texas-calibrated certified scales. Rare posted floor: '80% or better for good clean gold under a few ounces'. 'Free appraisal and there is never an obligation to sell.' 'No appointment necessary.' BBB-accredited since 1998 per site.

buyers.name: Houston Empire Gold Buyers
buyers.hours: Daily 7am-10pm (walk-in); private appointments for high-value items
buyers.testing_transparency: Electronic assay and certified precision scales, evaluated live in front of you
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'advanced XRF gold testing technology and certified precision scales to evaluate your items in front of you', 'live XRF testing in front of you'. Claims 'no middlemen or hidden fees', live/real-time market pricing, licensed and bonded by City of Houston, family-owned. Walk-ins welcome 7am-10pm daily (unusually long hours — worth confirming); years in business not stated.

buyers.name: Elemetal (Houston)
buyers.testing_transparency: Full refinery assay of karat scrap, sweeps, and bullion; method not described on the location page
buyers.evidence_notes: Location page: bills itself as America's largest precious metals refiner; refines karat scrap, jewelry, placer gold, coins, bench sweeps, bullion. 'There are no hidden fees—our services are clear, straightforward'. Pricing based on 'the amount of precious metal anticipated to be recovered and the current market price'. Walk-in drop-off during business hours; provides shipping insurance at no added cost. Primarily serves the trade (dealers, jewelers, pawnbrokers) but accepts general customers — best fit for bulk/scrap sellers, not single-ring consumers.

buyers.name: Sell Gold Houston
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: buys 10k/14k/18k/24k gold with same-day payout, offers 'based on todays spot price'. Appointment-based: 'set up your appointment with Sell Gold Houston today'. Site is thin — no hours, no testing method, no fee policy, no years-in-business claim. Address and phone published on site but flagged for verification.

buyers.name: DJP Diamonds (DJP Jewelers & Luxury Buyers)
buyers.testing_transparency: References 'most advanced tools and technology'; no specific testing method named
buyers.evidence_notes: Houston-gold-buyers page: 'more than 40 years of experience', free appraisals, 'top dollar offers'. Galleria-adjacent location (Fountain View Dr, 77057). Walk-ins 'always welcome' though appointments encouraged. Lists three phone numbers on the page; no testing methodology or payout percentages published — flagged for verification.
